'''Galantos''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Utos system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was located on the [[Widek Bypass]], near the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Its first contact with the galactic community was quite ancient, as at least one [[Fian/Legends|Fian]] served as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] 500 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[First Great Schism]].

The planet's surface was covered in smooth, pale green gelatinous bodies with continental islands. During large storms, the surface of Galantos would roll and shift. Because Galantos' crust was severed into drifting tectonic plates, the islands were wracked with regular seismic vibrations known as [[gelquake]]s. Galantos imported chromite from [[New Brigia]].

The gelatin was an organic substance which provided life-giving nutrients to all life on the planet, including the indigenous [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] Fia. To protect their [[City/Legends|cities]], the Fia built reinforced structures and developed a transportation system built on balloons to avoid [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquake]]-sensitive roads. Despite their ingenuity, the Fia preferred the gelatin and only took to the landmasses to interact with outsiders.

Most non-Fia lived in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city of [[Gal'fian'deprisi]] where the planet's major [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] was located. It was there that the [[Black Hammer pirates|Black Hammer Pirates]] made their [[Black Hammer pirate base|headquarters]].

After escaping the [[Purge (prison barge)|''Purge'']] and [[Vector (Star Destroyer)|''Vector'']] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] landed on the planet, accompanied by [[Zahara Cody]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Trig Longo]]. He and Chewbacca went one way, to go and find the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and retrieve it. Cody and Trig sought out transport to the planet [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] after separating from Solo and Chewbacca.

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Jobath Knox]], the [[Council]]or of Galantos, went to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to appeal directly to [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], waiting outside the Solo Family apartment for an audience. Leia, acting outside the defined powers of the Chief of State, admitted Galantos to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was almost attacked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] despite a Fian deal made with the [[Peace Brigade]].
